sources.notes: 28K followers · Category: Hospital · Always open · Price range $$. Tagline from FB cover graphic: 'We constantly strive to give YOU quality care.' Rehabilitation Medicine unit posts list separate contact bghirehab@gmail.com / 0992-895-3006. Legacy domain bernardinogeneralhospital.com is expired (Squarespace) — not linked on site. Cover + gallery photos downloaded via Chrome DevTools MCP (network response, signed fbcdn params) at native resolution.
